skeptic.top_risk: Two load-bearing claims (farming-proof parameter set, non-cannibalization of fishing/mining) both unvalidated — ~24 threshold self-described anecdotal, reward-dilution admitted unmeasured.
skeptic.cheapest_evidence: Shadow-run the debounced counter in production logging spawns-that-would-fire (no embeds/rewards) across low/med/high channels for a week, plus back-of-envelope coins/hour-vs-fishing calc.
skeptic.report: Novel bit: coupling game state to organic chat volume. Failure economic not technical: no single static threshold generalizes across tiers; reward cannibalization unmeasured; paced-spam via rotation. Cheapest evidence: shadow mode 1 week + spreadsheet + worst-case farm model. Cost low-moderate; concurrency on first-claimer real care-point. Smallest slice: two-stage shadow then XP-only live, withhold coins/items until (b) measured.

builder.top_risk: Parameter set (threshold/debounce/cooldown/cap) is anecdotal and untuned, so encounters land spammy, invisible, or farmable across traffic tiers.
builder.cheapest_evidence: Shadow-mode the spawn trigger in real channels: log would-be spawns (no embed) and count spawns/hour across low/med/high channels before shipping the claim button.
builder.report: Passive engagement engine reusing services, no new currency. Failure: economics of (a)/(b) asserted not measured; single threshold must satisfy conflicting constraints; paced-spam; cannibalization. Cheapest evidence: shadow mode; farm sim; before/after earn-rate. Build cost low (reuse avoids economy audit); concurrency on Claim non-trivial. Smallest slice: shadow observation then single guild coins-only (skip shared pool), add item rewards after earn-rate measurement.

user_value.top_risk: No single parameter set may be simultaneously rare-but-visible across all tiers AND farm-unprofitable; reward-pool dilution of fishing/mining unmeasured.
user_value.cheapest_evidence: Replay historical per-channel message logs through debounce/threshold counter offline to chart spawn frequency across tiers, and tally projected reward emission against current fishing/mining earn rates — no deploy.
user_value.report: Passive engagement, conservative economic thesis. Failure: (a) two-sided constraint may have no feasible fixed-threshold solution; (b) self-flagged gap; coordinated paced chatter attackable. Cheapest evidence: offline log replay + projected emission vs earn rates. Cost low; novel risk is calibration + economy coupling; owner/target metric not measured. Smallest slice: offline replays first, then thin flagged slice on small channel set with cap + cooldown from day one + telemetry; hold rollout until (b) measured.

synthesizer.top_risk: Both load-bearing claims are unmeasured: no proven fixed parameter set stays rare-but-visible across low/med/high traffic while defeating paced-spam farming (a), and reward-pool dilution of fishing/mining is self-flagged unmeasured (b).
synthesizer.cheapest_evidence: Offline-replay historical per-channel message logs through the debounce/threshold counter to chart spawn frequency per tier, plus a spreadsheet of projected reward emission vs current fishing/mining earn rates — no deploy; escalate to a week of production shadow-mode if logs unavailable.
synthesizer.report: Unanimous BUILD (0.60/0.62/0.60 -> 0.61); disagreement only about how cheaply the two unproven claims can be tested. Core claim: passive engagement engine reusing primitives, no new currency; novel only in coupling game state to ambient chat. Strongest failure: economic not technical; (a) fixed ~24 raw-count threshold may have no feasible point across tiers (likely needs rate/time component); (b) reward cannibalization not measured; secondary paced-spam/rotation; concurrency on first-claimer the one code care-point. Cheapest evidence: offline log replay (no deploy) then production shadow ~1 week then farm sim. Cost low via reuse; danger is calibration-by-guess into live economy; target metric not measured. Smallest slice: offline replay/shadow, then thin live slice XP-only or single-guild coins-only with cap+cooldown day one + telemetry, add shared-pool items only after earn-rate measurement; gate rollout on (b).
